title: Camera Lock On
description: Lock on to other players, ideal for video/steam production
body:
This mod points your camera at a target player.
It is designed for film making and live streams. Always ask for permission before using this mod in multiplayer as it could give the user an unfair advantage.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hs8xiEuw8FQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


`/camera_lock_on auto` locks to the person closest to your cross hair

`/camera_lock_on player <player>` locks to a specific player (if in render distance)

`/camera_lock_on off` stop locking

`/camera_lock_on hud_status` display what the camera is locking on to at the top of the screen
